titleStmt.title: SII 8.706: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 706. (A.R. No. 390 of 1903). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TILLAIYAMMAN TEMPLE AT CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakalapuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkopperuñci
ṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu 3vatu mituṉanāyaṟṟu tiyati Iraṇṭānāḷ ta
ṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr kavuṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
tillaivaṉamuṭaiyaparameśu ri tiruvaruḷāl Ikkoyil te
vakaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṉukku Aṉṉiyakarmatiṭṭuk kuṭuttaparicāvatu .
piṭākai veḷḷa kka civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉ śrīmantarakatiyatevaṉaiyakaṉum Iva n=ta mpi tirucciṟṟa
mpalamuṭaiyāṉ centaṉpakkalum Ivarkaḷ mātākkaḷ U
ḷḷiṭṭārpakkal koṇṭa paḷḷipaṭaiyil cuntaricoḻavatikku ki
ḻakku kaṇṭarātittaṉvāykkālukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu
mutal catirattu kākkaipātti Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilam vilaio
laippaṭi nilam kku kācu 2 10 8nta peruṅkavuciyaṉ Iravi ti
rukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ makaṉpakkalum Uḻaiccāṉaṉ kaṉakacavāpa
tipakkalum Ivaṉ mātāvum yivaṉ pirāmaṇipakkalum koṇṭa muṭṭai cuntarivatikku
kiḻakku vāṉavaṉmātevi vākkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu
koṇṭa Olaippaṭi viḷainilamum kollaiyum Uṭpaṭa vilaiolaippaṭi nilam 2 10 6
viṉāl kācu 6 1000 5 100- m Ipperuṅkavuciyaṉ Iravi tirukkaḻippālai Uṭaiyāṉum Iva
r makkaḷpakkalum koṇṭa tirucciṟṟampalavatikku kiḻakku vānavaṉmātevivāk
kālukku vaṭakku ttu taramiliyil koṇṭa Ōlaippaṭi nilam 2 10 4
Ippaṭi koṇṭa Olaippaṭi kācu 2 1000 5 100 m Āka nilam4 I pacu4 10 2- mum koṇ
ṭa Olaippaṭikaḷāl kācu 3 10000 7 1000 Ikkācu mulpatteḻāyiramum paṇṭārakkācile
yiṭṭu Eṉperāle koṇṭamaiyil yiṉṉilaṅkaḷ nācciyaārkku tirunāma
ttukkāṇiyāka tiruvutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ tevakaṉmi koyilkaṇakka(ka)rumRead kaṇakkaṉukku.
kaviṇiyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉeṉ . Itu Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻu tiṉeṉ
puliyūruṭaiyāṉeṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi cammatittu tirivutiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ kavu
ṇiyiṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉeṉ . Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu 2
Digital edition of SII 8.706 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
